articles.title: Meta is adding ridiculous 'rate limits' and a soft paywall to its smart glasses
articles.description: Would you pay $20 a month for access to AI hardware you already own? That appears to be one of Meta's next bets. This week, it quietly announced that your glasses' Conversation Focus feature will soon be limited to three hours of use per month, unless you pay for a $19.99 Meta One Premium subscription. […]
articles.author: Sean Hollister

articles.title: Anthropic's long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
articles.description: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access Wednesday to users globally on Claude platforms, and that the company would re-enable access on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft […]
articles.author: Hayden Field
